description_long: This is a vintage-style triplane with three stacked wings, each featuring a warm gradient from orange to brown, supported by struts. The fuselage is streamlined and painted in a muted gray, tapering towards the tail, which has a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer with matching color accents. The nose houses a single wooden propeller and a rounded engine cowling, both rendered in reddish-brown hues. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the upper wing, with a small windshield visible. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail skid, all fixed and non-retractable. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century biplanes and triplanes, with a compact, lightweight structure and exposed mechanical elements.
description: A vintage triplane with three orange-brown wings, an open cockpit, wooden propeller, and fixed landing gear, evoking early aviation designs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the three stacked wings, open cockpit, and streamlined gray fuselage with a visible tail and fixed landing gear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular engine cowling, wooden propeller, and the full span of the three wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the triplane's wing structure, tail assembly, and the open cockpit from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and the alignment of the three wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Triplane configuration with three straight, parallel wings stacked vertically; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit located just behind the upper wing with a small windshield.
